# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
# Test cookies for unit tests
.example.com	TRUE	/	FALSE	1893456000	test_cookie	test_value
.example.com	TRUE	/path	TRUE	1893456000	secure_cookie	secure_value
.other.com	TRUE	/	FALSE	1893456000	other_cookie	other_value
# Comment line should be ignored

.example.com	TRUE	/	FALSE	0	session_cookie	session_value
